_comment_draft: DRAFT -- not yet published. Bucket repo does not exist. SHA256 below is a placeholder; fill from the v1.x GitHub Release at tag time.
_comment_owner: Bob Sacamano (packaging). Filed under S02E16 The Catalog.
_comment_v1_v2: Tracks the v1.x line. The v2 line ships separately as packaging/scoop/az-ai.json. Do not collapse until the dual-binary transition completes.
_comment_artifact: Release-artifact contract: azure-openai-cli-win-x64.zip from .github/workflows/release.yml v1 matrix. Binary inside the zip is AzureOpenAI_CLI.exe; bin entry below renames it to azure-openai-cli on PATH.
_comment_notice: NOTICE + THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md + LICENSE must be staged at the zip root by the release pipeline so post_install can surface them. Lippman gate.
description: Azure OpenAI CLI -- AOT single-binary agent for terminal and text-expander workflows
post_install: Write-Host 'azure-openai-cli installed. Third-party notices bundled next to the binary:'
